name: Fortescue Ltd
description: Fortescue Ltd, formerly Fortescue Metals Group Ltd, is an Australian mining and green energy company. It is one of the world's largest producers of iron ore, with significant mining operations in the Pilbara region of Western Australia. In addition to its core iron ore business, Fortescue is rapidly expanding into green energy, green hydrogen, and technology through its Fortescue Energy division, aiming to decarbonize its operations and provide global green energy solutions.
